Class FailoverFailureAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.boot.diagnostics.AbstractFailureAnalyzer<org.springframework.beans.factory.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException>
org.springframework.boot.diagnostics.analyzer.AbstractInjectionFailureAnalyzer<org.springframework.beans.factory.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException>
com.societegenerale.failover.analyzer.FailoverFailureAnalyzer
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.boot.diagnostics.FailureAnalyzer, org.springframework.context.EnvironmentAware, org.springframework.core.Ordered
public class FailoverFailureAnalyzer extends org.springframework.boot.diagnostics.analyzer.AbstractInjectionFailureAnalyzer<org.springframework.beans.factory.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException> implements org.springframework.core.Ordered, org.springframework.context.EnvironmentAware
Spring Boot FailureAnalyzer that produces actionable startup diagnostics when a required failover bean is missing.

Intercepts NoSuchBeanDefinitionException and checks whether the missing bean is a FailoverStore, a FailoverExecution, or a JdbcTemplate needed by the JDBC store. For each case it emits a targeted message that names the missing dependency and describes how to resolve it (e.g. adding the correct failover.store.type property or the JDBC dependency).

Author:
Anand Manissery
